item.title: PS Seasoning & Spices, Inc.: Blackstone Parmesan Ranch Seasoning, Net Wt 7.3 oz (207g). Recall
item.product: Blackstone Parmesan Ranch Seasoning, Net Wt 7.3 oz (207g).
item.summary: Product was made with milk powder recalled by the supplier due to Salmonella contamination. Product details: Blackstone Parmesan Ranch Seasoning, Net Wt 7.3 oz (207g). UPC 7 17604-04106 2. Manufactured for North Atlantic Imports, LLC, Logan, UT 84321.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
